_comment: skill-hub-query credentials template. Copy to ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-~/.config}/skill-hub-query/credentials.json and chmod 600.

_fields_doc.endpoint: Required. Base URL of your Skill Hub. Env SKILL_HUB_URL overrides.
_fields_doc.token: Hub API token. Env SKILL_HUB_TOKEN overrides this.
_fields_doc.authHeader: HTTP header name for auth (default: Authorization). Env SKILL_HUB_AUTH_HEADER overrides.
_fields_doc.authScheme: Header value prefix; include trailing space (default: 'Bearer '; set to '' for X-API-Key style). Env SKILL_HUB_AUTH_SCHEME overrides.
